entries.note: V56-B consumes the shipped V56-A packet, contract, proposal, checkpoint, diagnostics, and conformance surfaces by default.
V56-B adds one exact action-class taxonomy over the shipped V56-A contract/proposal surfaces before any live ticket issuance.
Checkpoint acceptance remains necessary, but runtime-state compatibility, selected live class membership, and bounded ticket scope are also required before ticket issuance.
V56-B selects only local_write and local_reversible_execute as live-gated classes, with the starter reference path using local_write only.
